title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node and browsers (via proxy).

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama; use local models in chains, agents, RAG, and tool-calling pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (now Open WebUI); chat with multiple models, RAG, admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent API, streaming, embeddings, and custom timeout options.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper for Ollama with chat history, prompt templates, and model switching.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like plugin powered by Ollama models inside VS Code.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust client for Ollama; strongly typed, async/await, supports streaming and embeddings.

title: ollama-dotnet
summary: .NET client for Ollama; supports .NET 6+, streaming chat, embeddings, and tool calling.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Minimal Tauri-based desktop GUI for Ollama; cross-platform, < 5 MB binary.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration for Ollama; plug local models into RAG pipelines and evaluation workflows.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community cookbook with recipes for function-calling, RAG, fine-tune, and edge deployment.

title: ollama-nvidia
summary: NVIDIA GPU-optimized Docker images for Ollama with CUDA 12 and tensor-parallel inference.

title: ollama-model-library
summary: Curated Modelfiles for 100+ models (Phi-3, Gemma, CodeQwen) with quantization settings.

title: Ollama Reddit Community
summary: Active subreddit for sharing models, troubleshooting, and showcasing Ollama-powered projects.
